_meta.description: RCRA hazardous waste codes (F-list, P-list, U-list) from 40 CFR § 261 Subpart D.
_meta.lookup_strategy: Match by CAS number first, fall back to lowercase chemical name match.
_meta.scope_note: Starter set covering common molecular-biology reagents. Extend as the reagent_term_map grows.

1239-45-8.name: Ethidium bromide
1239-45-8._note: Ethidium bromide itself is not formally on the U-list; many institutions treat it as a state-regulated hazardous waste. Verify with your local EH&S before relying on this code.

spent_solvent_lists._note: F001–F005 cover spent solvents and are assigned at the waste-generation step, not the reagent itself. The engine should apply these dynamically when classifying the waste stream of a protocol's outputs, not when looking up a single reagent.
spent_solvent_lists.F001: Spent halogenated solvents used in degreasing (TCE, perchloroethylene, methylene chloride, 1,1,1-trichloroethane, carbon tetrachloride, chlorinated fluorocarbons).
spent_solvent_lists.F002: Spent halogenated solvents (TCE, methylene chloride, perchloroethylene, 1,1,1-trichloroethane, chlorobenzene, 1,1,2-trichloro-1,2,2-trifluoroethane, ortho-dichlorobenzene, trichlorofluoromethane, 1,1,2-trichloroethane).
spent_solvent_lists.F003: Spent non-halogenated solvents (xylene, acetone, ethyl acetate, ethyl benzene, ethyl ether, methyl isobutyl ketone, n-butyl alcohol, cyclohexanone, methanol).
spent_solvent_lists.F004: Spent non-halogenated solvents (cresols, cresylic acid, nitrobenzene).
spent_solvent_lists.F005: Spent non-halogenated solvents (toluene, methyl ethyl ketone, carbon disulfide, isobutanol, pyridine, benzene, 2-ethoxyethanol, 2-nitropropane).
